inbound_signal: DKR-0 direct gates found nonzero SDK slop; DKR-1 v3 independently passed 11 cleanup and 6 activation behaviors but its checkpoint records a missing root replay path.
decision_delta: Kept both conclusions unaccepted, required root-resolvable evidence, and continued only read-only DKR-0, DKR-1, and DKR-4 work while the cleanup breaking flag stays open.
expected_effect: Prevent passing behavioral evidence from masking an unusable public proof path or current style debt that the same PR must remove.
evidence_delta: DKR-1 behavior reads 17 of 17 combined cases; its recorded replay path fails repository-root resolution. DKR-0 authoritative SDK lint reads a nonzero slop count pending governed checkpoint output. Objective remains 0 of 16.
problem_restatement: Accept only root-replayable contracts, then make the product changes that restore cleanup and style walls without expanding the API surface.
alternatives_considered: Accept the DKR-1 behavior and repair its path during implementation
Treat current SDK lint failures as unrelated baseline
Keep both walls blocking and record exact corrective scope before progression
assumptions_at_risk: The DKR-1 path defect is mechanical and does not change the contract
Current SDK slop can be removed inside the accepted PR reshape
DKR-4 bounded composition needs no additional public worker abstraction
dkr_decision: Continue discovery and direct gates; do not promote any CKR or PKR and do not dispatch product work.

hallucination_sweep.claim: A replay that only works from its worker directory is a repository-root executable claim.
hallucination_sweep.verdict: rejected; checkpoint must record the working root command

missing_context_sweep.claim: The current lint failure can be classified as pre-existing and ignored.
missing_context_sweep.verdict: rejected pending the governed direct gate; the PR owns its touched SDK surface

unexpected_results.claim: Behavioral cleanup proof completed before its formal replay path became admissible.

anti_goal_violation_review.claim: cleanup_business_state_mutation_count remains breached and SDK slop may add a second breaking wall.
anti_goal_violation_review.verdict: cleanup breaking open; slop awaits governed direct read before flagging
